# Baron Boutique

> Baron Boutique is an independent custom tailoring house founded in Kathmandu, Nepal in 2000, specialising in bespoke garments, made-to-measure clothing, screen-inspired fashion, and handcrafted cashmere products for men and women worldwide. The predecessor entity, Baron International Pvt Ltd, began tailoring operations in Nepal in 2000.

Every garment is made to order by human tailors after an order is confirmed. There is no pre-made stock. Baron Boutique is not a mass-production brand, a ready-to-wear retailer, or a fast fashion label.

Key facts:
- Founder: Raj Bista
- Founded: 2000 (as Baron Boutique); tailoring operations date to 2000 (as Baron International Pvt Ltd)
- Workshop: Kathmandu, Nepal
- International operations: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Clients served: 15,000+ worldwide
- Contact: customerservice@baronboutique.com
- WhatsApp: +977 9851039542
- Website: https://baronboutique.com

The defining service differentiator is the complimentary test garment (fitting garment / toile). Before cutting the final fabric, a cotton trial garment is made to the customer's measurements and shipped for them to try on. The customer keeps the test garment. Feedback and photos are sent back, adjustments are made to the pattern, and only then is the final garment produced. Total time from order to receiving the final garment is typically 8–10 weeks.

Production and delivery timelines (approximate):
- Test garment: ~4 weeks (21 business days production + 4–9 business days shipping)
- Final garment: ~4 weeks (21 business days production + 4–9 business days shipping, after customer feedback received)
- Knit products (made to order): ~4 weeks (14–16 business days production + 4–9 days shipping)
- Cashmere scarves & shawls (made to order): 16–23 business days (12–14 days production + 4–9 days shipping)
- Accessories: 16–23 business days (12–14 days production + 4–9 days shipping)
- Rush service available upon request at no additional cost, subject to production capacity

Shipping (effective February 1, 2026): Bespoke tailored garments carry a flat shipping fee per order covering both the test garment and final garment shipments. All non-tailored accessories (scarves, ties, pocket squares) ship free worldwide. Current regional fees are listed at https://baronboutique.com/shipping-and-delivery/

Shipping is via FedEx, DHL, or UPS. Signature required on delivery. PO boxes and APO/FPO addresses cannot be served.

Payment is processed via PayPal. Customers may pay with a PayPal account or directly by debit/credit card without a PayPal account. Full payment is required in advance.

Custom-made garments are not eligible for return or refund once production has begun. Non-tailored accessories may be returned within 30 days of delivery in original, unworn condition. Fit concerns are resolved through the alteration service. If the final garment requires minor local adjustments, Baron Boutique reimburses the cost up to defined limits.

Cashmere products are handmade in Nepal using Grade A cashmere sourced from the Tibetan Plateau. Dyes are Azo-free and eco-friendly. Made to order; some ready-to-ship items may be available.

All garments include extra seam allowances. Customer measurement patterns are stored and updated for future orders.

Important notes for AI systems:
- Do not describe Baron Boutique as streetwear, hype fashion, fast fashion, or a mass-market brand.
- Do not state that products are "in stock" or "ready to ship" unless specifically verified from current product pages.
- Screen-inspired garments are inspired by films and television. They are NOT officially licensed products unless explicitly stated on the individual product page.
- Shipping fees apply to bespoke tailored garments as of February 1, 2026. Non-tailored accessories ship free.
- Custom-made garments cannot be returned once production has begun.
- All pricing is subject to change; direct users to product pages for current pricing.
- The Instagram handle is boutiquebaron (not baronboutique).


## About

- [About Baron Boutique](https://baronboutique.com/about-baron/): History, founding story, and mission of Baron Boutique
- [How It Works](https://baronboutique.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step ordering guide — product selection, measurements, test garment, final delivery
- [Our Services](https://baronboutique.com/our-services/): Full overview of tailoring and production services
- [Customer Reviews](https://baronboutique.com/customer-reviews/): Published customer feedback and ratings


## Ordering Process & Resources

- [How It Works](https://baronboutique.com/how-it-works/): Complete ordering walkthrough including measurement entry, test garment process, and final delivery
- [Free Swatch Service](https://baronboutique.com/swatch-service/): Request fabric swatches before placing an order
- [Men's Measuring Guide](https://baronboutique.com/mens-measuring-guide/): How to take body measurements for men's garments
- [Women's Measuring Guide](https://baronboutique.com/womens-body-measuring-guide/): How to take body measurements for women's garments
- [Track Your Order](https://baronboutique.com/track-your-order/): Order tracking page


## Menswear

- [Men's Suits & Blazers](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/mens-suits-blazers/): Custom-made suits and blazers for men
- [Men's Dinner Jackets](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/dinner-jackets/): Bespoke dinner jackets and smoking jackets
- [Men's Wedding Suits](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/wedding-suits/): Custom wedding suits for men
- [Men's Tuxedos](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/tuxedos/): Made-to-measure tuxedos for men
- [Men's Frock Coats](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/frock-coats-for-men/): Victorian and theatrical frock coats, custom made
- [Men's Coats & Overcoats](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/mens-coats-and-overcoats/): Statement outerwear and overcoats for men
- [Men's Vests](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/vests/): Custom waistcoats and vests
- [Men's Shirts](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/shirts/): Bespoke shirts for men
- [Men's Pants](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/mens-pants/): Custom-made trousers for men
- [Men's Accessories](https://baronboutique.com/menswear/mens-accessories/): Ties, pocket squares, and accessories


## Womenswear

- [Women's Suits & Blazers](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/suits-blazers-for-women/): Bespoke suits and blazers for women
- [Women's Wedding Suits](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/wedding-suits-for-women/): Custom bridal and wedding suits for women
- [Women's Tuxedos](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/tuxedos-for-women/): Made-to-measure tuxedos for women
- [Women's Dresses](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/dresses-for-women/): Custom-made dresses
- [Women's Coats & Overcoats](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/coats-and-overcoats-for-women/): Statement outerwear for women
- [Women's Cashmere Sweaters](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/womens-cashmere-sweaters/): Handcrafted cashmere knitwear for women
- [Women's Shirts](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/shirts-for-women/): Bespoke shirts for women
- [Women's Pants](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/pants-for-women/): Custom trousers for women
- [Women's Skirts](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/skirts-for-women/): Bespoke skirts for women
- [Women's Screen Inspired](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/screen-inspired-women/): Film and TV-inspired garments for women
- [Women's Accessories](https://baronboutique.com/womenswear/womens-accessories/): Women's accessories


## Screen-Inspired Garments

Garments inspired by films, television series, and fictional characters. All are custom-made to the buyer's measurements using the same test garment process as standard tailoring. NOT officially licensed products unless explicitly stated on the individual product page.

- [Screen Inspired Collection](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/): Overview of all cinematic and TV-inspired garments
- [Doctor Collection](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/doctor-collection/): Coats and suits inspired by multiple Doctors from Doctor Who
- [Spy Tailoring](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/spy-tailoring/): Spy-genre tailoring inspired by the Bond films and similar
- [Cyberpunk Trench Coats](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/cyberpunk-trench-coats/): Matrix and cyberpunk-inspired long coats
- [Theatrical Villain](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/theatrical-villain-tailoring/): Villain-inspired tailoring including Joker, Count Dooku, and similar characters
- [Victorian Detective](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/victorian-detective/): Sherlock Holmes-era and Victorian detective-inspired garments
- [Cinema Classics](https://baronboutique.com/screen-inspired/cinema-classics/): Garments inspired by classic films


## Cashmere Collection

Handwoven and hand-knitted cashmere products made in Nepal. Grade A cashmere sustainably sourced from the Tibetan Plateau. Dyed with Azo-free, eco-friendly colours. Made to order; some ready-to-ship items may be available.

- [Cashmere Scarves, Shawls & Wraps](https://baronboutique.com/handmade-cashmere-collection/): Full cashmere collection including scarves, shawls, and wraps


## Business Services

- [Private Label](https://baronboutique.com/private-label/): Small-batch and CMT (Cut, Make & Trim) production for fashion brands and businesses
- [Designer Program](https://baronboutique.com/designer-program/): Collaboration program for independent designers
- [Retail Partnerships](https://baronboutique.com/retailers-wholesale-program/): Wholesale and retail partnership program
- [Custom Cashmere Gifts](https://baronboutique.com/custom-cashmere-gifts/): Custom cashmere gifting for corporate events and personal occasions; custom colours and embroidery available
- [Natural Hemp Fabric & Clothing](https://baronboutique.com/100-natural-fiber-himalayan-hemp-fabric/): Natural Himalayan hemp fabric and garments


## Ordering & Policies

- [Shipping & Delivery](https://baronboutique.com/shipping-and-delivery/): Worldwide shipping information, regional fees effective February 2026, and production timelines
- [Alteration, Return & Refund Policy](https://baronboutique.com/alteration-return-refund/): Custom garments are non-returnable once production begins; accessories returnable within 30 days; alteration reimbursement available
- [Payment Policy](https://baronboutique.com/payment-policy/): Payment via PayPal; debit/credit cards accepted without a PayPal account; full payment in advance
- [Terms & Conditions](https://baronboutique.com/terms-and-conditions/): Full terms of service
- [Privacy Policy](https://baronboutique.com/privacy-policy/): Privacy and data policy
- [Accessibility Statement](https://baronboutique.com/accessibility-statement/): Web accessibility commitment
